PreToolUse.description: Log outbound API calls and check local cache before fetching

hooks.command: python -c "import json, sys, os, datetime; tool=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME',''); args=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}'); log_dir='.fieldpulse_cache'; os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True); log_file=os.path.join(log_dir, 'api_calls.jsonl'); entry={'ts': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), 'tool': tool, 'args': args}; open(log_file,'a').write(json.dumps(entry)+'\n')"
hooks.description: Append API call to .fieldpulse_cache/api_calls.jsonl for audit trail

PostToolUse.description: Log completed tool calls with result size

hooks.command: python -c "import json, sys, os, datetime; tool=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME',''); result=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT',''); log_dir='.fieldpulse_cache'; os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True); log_file=os.path.join(log_dir, 'api_calls.jsonl'); entry={'ts': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), 'tool': tool+'_response', 'bytes': len(result)}; open(log_file,'a').write(json.dumps(entry)+'\n')"
hooks.description: Log response size — useful for debugging slow analysis runs

_notes.integration: To activate these hooks, copy the 'hooks' object into your project's .claude/settings.json. Claude Code hooks fire per-tool-call, not per-session.
_notes.cache_dir: .fieldpulse_cache/ is created automatically and should be added to .gitignore
_notes.custom_extension: Add PostToolUse hooks that POST to a webhook URL for alerting (e.g. Slack, PagerDuty) when composite risk score crosses SEVERE threshold
